title: salix × rubens var. palustris
intro: Salix × rubens var. palustris, also known as Willowherb or Marsh Willowherb, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the willow family (Salicaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and providing antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Salix × rubens var. palustris can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
